title: Cost & Tokens
description: Product owner / engineering lead: real-time LLM spend, token breakdown, cache effectiveness, per-model SLOs, and top users.

panels.title: Cost Rate (USD/h) by Model
panels.description: Live spend — catch runaway cost spikes within minutes.

panels.title: Cache Hit Token Rate by Model
panels.description: Prompt caching effectiveness — cache misses that should be hits are wasted spend.

panels.title: Daily Cost by Model (USD)
panels.description: Authoritative ledger — survives restarts, billing source of truth.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, model AS metric, sum(cost_usd) AS cost_usd FROM llm_requests WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

panels.title: Token Breakdown by Model
panels.description: Identify prompt-heavy vs completion-heavy models. (Cache-hit tokens are Prometheus-only — see the Cache Hit Token Rate panel; llm_requests has no cache column.)

targets.rawSql: SELECT model, sum(prompt_tokens) AS prompt_tokens, sum(completion_tokens) AS completion_tokens, COALESCE(sum(reasoning_tokens), 0) AS reasoning_tokens, sum(total_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM llm_requests WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY model ORDER BY sum(cost_usd) DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: Cost per Request Type
panels.description: Router sub-call overhead as percentage of total spend.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_type, count(*) AS requests, round(avg(cost_usd)::numeric, 6) AS avg_cost_usd, round(avg(total_tokens)::numeric) AS avg_tokens FROM llm_requests WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY request_type ORDER BY avg_cost_usd DESC;

panels.title: p95 Latency & TTFT by Model (ms)
panels.description: Model-level SLO — compare providers on latency vs cost tradeoff.

targets.rawSql: SELECT model, round(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms)::numeric) AS p95_latency_ms, round(percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ttft_ms)::numeric) AS p95_ttft_ms, count(*) AS requests FROM llm_requests WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY model ORDER BY p95_latency_ms DESC NULLS LAST;

panels.title: LLM Error Rate by Model
panels.description: Provider reliability — which model fails most.

targets.rawSql: SELECT model, error_code, count(*) AS occurrences FROM llm_requests WHERE error_code IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY model, error_code ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 50;

panels.title: Top Users by Spend
panels.description: Abuse detection and per-user quota planning.

targets.rawSql: SELECT user_id::text, count(*) AS requests, round(sum(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS total_cost_usd, round(avg(cost_usd)::numeric, 6) AS avg_cost_usd FROM llm_requests WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total_cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20;
